_comment: NPC: Lei Ji (雷记). Canon ID: N46. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Lei Ji
personality: loyal thunder beast companion; imprinted on Wang Lin

perception_tiers.core_formation: Lei Ji; Spirit Severing thunder beast
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Ascendant-tier; Wang Lin's bonded thunder beast

note: Wang Lin's bonded thunder beast companion; reached Ascendant tier

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
